farmacos.mecanismo_principal: NMDA antagonist; ↑ glutamate; neuroplasticity
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Respiratory depression; abuse; ulcerative cystitis (chronic use)
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; ACOG: exceptional use; evaluate risk-benefit
farmacos._search: ketamine adp_rapid_01 rapid-acting antidepressant (off-label) NMDA antagonist; ↑ glutamate; neuroplasticity N01AX03 rapid antidepressant response; suicidal crisis treatment-resistant depression; acute suicidal ideation
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: NMDA antagonist with rapid (hours) and robust antidepressant effect in treatment-resistant and bipolar depression. IV use is the off-label gold standard. Requires cardiovascular monitoring (BP/ECG) and dissociation surveillance. Risk of cystitis and dependence in chronic/recreation use.

perlas_clinicas.source: The Maudsley Prescribing Guidelines in Psychiatry (15th Ed)
perlas_clinicas.quote: IV ketamine... is the gold standard... produced a significant antidepressant effect within hours... effects on suicidality
Associated with transient increases in BP, tachycardia and arrhythmias. Pretreatment ECG required... ketamine-induced cystitis is a recognised complication

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitor (SSRI); mild DAT inhibition at high doses
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: MDD; OCD; Panic Disorder; PTSD; PMDD; Social Anxiety Disorder
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; OCD; Panic Disorder; Social Anxiety Disorder; PTSD
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; EMA: individualize; ACOG: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
Naphthalenamine derivative SSRI. Unique SSRI with mild dopamine reuptake inhibition at high doses (sigma-1 binding), which may provide a mild activating profile. Considered the SSRI of choice in post-MI patients (SADHEART study).

⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Sertraline is the best choice... of antidepressant for patients after myocardial infarction because there is most safety data available (SADHEART study)
Sertraline has the unique property of inhibiting the dopamine reuptake transporter (DAT). High doses... might improve energy, motivation, and concentration

farmacos._search: sertraline adp_ssri_01 antidepressant ssri selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor N06AB06 anxiety; obsessive-compulsive symptoms; rumination

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitor (SSRI); 5-HT2C antagonism
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: MDD; OCD; Bulimia Nervosa; Panic Disorder; PMDD
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; EMA: individualize; ACOG: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
The SSRI with the longest half-life (norfluoxetine up to 15 days), which reduces the risk of withdrawal syndrome upon discontinuation. It has an activating profile due to 5-HT2C antagonism. Requires the longest washout period (5 weeks) before starting an MAOI.

⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Fluoxetine is unique... its 5-HT2C antagonism. This is 'activating' and can improve concentration and fatigue
Fluoxetine and its active metabolite (norfluoxetine) have a very long combined half-life... washing out for 5 weeks is necessary before starting an MAOI

farmacos._search: fluoxetine adp_ssri_02 antidepressant ssri selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor N06AB03 anhedonia; apathy; obsessive-compulsive symptoms

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Highly potent SSRI; M1 (muscarinic) antagonism; weak NET inhibition
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: MDD; OCD; Panic Disorder; Social Anxiety Disorder; GAD; PTSD; PMDD
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; GAD; OCD; PTSD; Panic Disorder; Social Anxiety Disorder
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; EMA: individualize; ACOG: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: SSRI with the highest affinity for the serotonin transporter (SERT) and mild norepinephrine reuptake inhibition at high doses. Notable for its short half-life and high risk of withdrawal syndrome. Possesses mild anticholinergic (M1) effects compared to other SSRIs.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Paroxetine is the only SSRI with mild anticholinergic (M1) properties... it also inhibits the norepinephrine transporter (NET)
SSRIs with short half-lives (e.g. paroxetine) are associated with a higher risk of withdrawal symptoms

farmacos._search: paroxetine adp_ssri_03 antidepressant ssri selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor N06AB05 somatic anxiety; insomnia with anxiety

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Highly selective SSRI
farmacos.ajuste_insuficiencia_renal: N/A in mild/moderate; caution in severe
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; EMA: individualize; Citalopram dose-dependent QT risk | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: MAOIs; Pimozide; Linezolid; Methylene Blue; Dapoxetine
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
Highly selective SSRI. Its use is conditioned by the dose-dependence of QTc interval prolongation. It is recommended not to exceed 40 mg (20 mg in the elderly). It is a racemic mixture, where S-citalopram is the active enantiomer.

⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Citalopram is composed of two enantiomers, R and S... the S-enantiomer is the active one
Citalopram and escitalopram are associated with dose-related prolongation of the QT interval... doses above 40mg are no longer recommended

farmacos._search: citalopram adp_ssri_04 antidepressant ssri selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor N06AB04 anxiety; rumination

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Most selective SSRI (S-enantiomer of citalopram)
farmacos.ajuste_insuficiencia_renal: N/A in mild/moderate; caution in severe
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; GAD; OCD; Panic Disorder; Social Anxiety Disorder
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; EMA: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
Pure S-enantiomer of citalopram. It is the SSRI with the highest selectivity for the serotonin transporter (SERT), which minimizes interactions and side effects. In the Cipriani meta-analysis (2018), it was positioned as one of the ADs with the best balance between efficacy and acceptability.

⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: In head-to-head comparisons, escitalopram was more effective than most other ADs and was among the best tolerated treatments
The S-enantiomer is the active form... Escitalopram removes the R-enantiomer, which can interfere with the SERT inhibition

farmacos._search: escitalopram adp_ssri_05 antidepressant ssri selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor N06AB10 anxiety; rumination

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitor (SSRI); strong Sigma-1 receptor agonist
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: limited data; EMA: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos._search: fluvoxamine adp_ssri_06 antidepressant ssri selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor N06AB08 obsessive-compulsive symptoms; anxiety
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: ⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Serotonin and Norepinephrine Reuptake Inhibitor (SNRI)
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Dizziness; insomnia; sexual dysfunction; increased BP
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: MDD; GAD; Social Anxiety Disorder; Panic Disorder
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; GAD; Social Anxiety Disorder; Panic Disorder
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA/EMA: individualize; ACOG: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depression with anxiety and comorbid pain
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: MAOIs; Risk of cardiac arrhythmia; Uncontrolled hypertension
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
Dual inhibitor (SNRI). At low doses (<150mg) it acts primarily as an SSRI; norepinephrine reuptake inhibition becomes clinically significant at higher doses. Known for an intense discontinuation syndrome ('brain zaps') due to its short half-life.

⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Venlafaxine... its potent 5-HT reuptake inhibition at low doses, and its NE reuptake inhibition at higher doses (150-225 mg/day)
Withdrawal symptoms (including 'electric shock' sensations) are more common with venlafaxine than with other SNRIs or SSRIs

farmacos._search: venlafaxine adp_snri_01 antidepressant dual (snri) serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor N06AX16 depression with anxiety and comorbid pain

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Active metabolite of venlafaxine; SNRI
farmacos.ajuste_insuficiencia_renal: 50 mg every other day in severe CKD
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: No approved for MDD (licensed outside EU)
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA/EMA: individualize; ACOG: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos._search: desvenlafaxine adp_snri_02 antidepressant dual (snri) serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor N06AX23 depression with fatigue/anergy
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: ⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Potent balanced inhibition of SERT and NET reuptake
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: MDD; GAD; Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy; Fibromyalgia; Chronic Musculoskeletal Pain
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; GAD; Diabetic Neuropathy; Stress Urinary Incontinence
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA/EMA: individualize; ACOG: individualize | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: MAOIs; Thioridazine; Uncontrolled narrow-angle glaucoma; Strong CYP1A2 inhibitors (fluvoxamine, ciprofloxacin)
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
Dual inhibitor (SNRI) with approved indication in diabetic neuropathic pain and fibromyalgia. Unlike venlafaxine, its dual action is significant from the initial doses (60mg). Requires caution in liver disease and in smokers (tobacco induces its metabolism via CYP1A2).

⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Duloxetine... may be especially useful in treating the physical symptoms of depression, such as chronic pain and fatigue
Duloxetine should be avoided in patients with liver disease because it has been associated with hepatic failure

farmacos._search: duloxetine adp_snri_03 antidepressant dual (snri) serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor N06AX21 depression with somatic pain

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: SNRI with high selectivity for NET reuptake (NET > SERT)
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Not licensed in the UK/EU for depression
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA/EMA: individualize; ACOG: balance relapse-risk | 🤰 Pregnancy (Goyal et al., 2023): Risk of exposure must be carefully weighed against the severe impact of untreated maternal depression (low birth weight, preterm birth). Individualize therapy.
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depression with apathy and low energy
farmacos._search: levomilnacipran adp_snri_04 antidepressant dual (snri) serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor (NET>SERT) N06AX28 depression with apathy and low energy
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: ⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: Use with caution in older adults; exacerbated risk of SIADH and hyponatremia.

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: NMDA antagonist; neuroplasticity
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: Treatment-resistant MDD; Suicidal ideation (with oral AD)
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Resistant depression; rapid symptom reduction; suicidal crisis
farmacos._search: esketamine (intranasal) adp_rapid_02 rapid-acting antidepressant NMDA antagonist; neuroplasticity N06AX27 resistant depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: S-enantiomer of ketamine, approved (nasal spray) for treatment-resistant depression and acute suicidal risk. Must be administered under supervision (REMS) due to sedation and dissociation risk. Twice-weekly induction; may reduce relapse risk vs placebo.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Esketamine is the S-isomer of ketamine... has a higher affinity for the NMDA receptor
Esketamine nasal spray is a treatment option for adults with treatment-resistant depression

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: GABA-A Positive Allosteric Modulator
farmacos.efectos_poco_frecuentes: Deep sedation; loss of consciousness; hypoxia
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Monitored facility administration; pulse oximetry; sedation assessment
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Rapid and sustained response in PPD with hospital logistics
farmacos._search: brexanolone adp_rapid_03 GABA-A neurosteroid (iv) positive allosteric modulator N05BX04 rapid/sustained response in ppd
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: GABA-A modulator neurosteroid for postpartum depression. Requires continuous 60-hour IV infusion under hospital monitoring (REMS) due to risk of excessive sedation/loss of consciousness. Rapid and sustained response (up to 30 days).

perlas_clinicas.quote: Rapid and significant improvements... effects lasting for at least 30 days

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: GABA-A Positive Allosteric Modulator
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Warning: impaired driving/activities; administer with fatty food
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: Alcohol; opioids; benzodiazepines; CYP3A4 inhibitors; CNS depressants
farmacos._search: zuranolone adp_rapid_04 GABA-A neurosteroid (oral) positive allosteric modulator N06AX30 short oral treatment for ppd
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: First oral treatment (14-day course) for postpartum depression; GABA-A positive allosteric modulator. Rapid action (improvement from day 3). Should be taken at night with fatty food. Outpatient alternative to brexanolone.

perlas_clinicas.quote: the first oral medication specifically pointed for postpartum depression... symptoms as early as day 3

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Norepinephrine and Dopamine Reuptake Inhibitor (NDRI)
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA/EMA: individualize; Avoid in ED patients
farmacos.indicaciones_off_label: ADHD; Sexual dysfunction induced by SSRIs
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Apathy; fatigue; anhedonia; weight gain concerns
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: MAOIs; Seizure disorders; Eating disorders (Bulimia/Anorexia); Alcohol/Sedative withdrawal
farmacos._search: bupropion adp_atyp_01 antidepressant ndri norepinephrine and dopamine reuptake inhibitor N06AX12 apathy; fatigue; anhedonia; weight gain concerns
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Unique antidepressant that inhibits reuptake of dopamine and norepinephrine (NDRI). Notable for being weight-neutral (or causing loss) and having the lowest risk of sexual dysfunction. Increases seizure risk at high doses. Contraindicated in eating disorders (bulimia/anorexia) due to seizure risk.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Bupropion is an activating antidepressant... useful for improving concentration and as an antidote for SSRI-induced sexual dysfunction
Bupropion is the only antidepressant consistently associated with weight loss

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Alpha-2 antagonist; 5-HT2 and 5-HT3 antagonist; H1 antagonist
farmacos._search: mirtazapine adp_atyp_02 antidepressant nassa alpha-2 antagonist N06AX11 insomnia; anorexia; underweight patients
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Noradrenergic and specific serotonergic antidepressant (NaSSA). Paradoxically, it is more sedating at lower doses (7.5–15mg) than at higher doses (30–45mg) due to increased noradrenergic firing. Promotes sleep and weight gain. Safe in combination with SSRIs (California Rocket Fuel).

perlas_clinicas.quote: Mirtazapine is more sedating at low doses because at these doses only H1 and 5-HT2C receptors are blocked... at higher doses, alpha-2 antagonism increases NE firing
Mirtazapine and bupropion are antidepressants of choice... if sexual dysfunction occurs with an SSRI

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: 5-HT2A/C antagonist; SERT inhibitor (at high doses); H1/Alpha-1 antagonist
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Priapism (Rare but emergency); QT prolongation; serotonin syndrome
farmacos._search: trazodone adp_atyp_03 antidepressant sari serotonin antagonist and reuptake inhibitor N06AX05 insomnia; agitation in elderly
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Serotonin antagonist and reuptake inhibitor (SARI). Most commonly used at low doses (25–100mg) as a hypnotic due to H1 and alpha-1 blockade. Rare but serious risk of priapism (1 in 8000). Avoid in recovery from MI.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Trazodone is a potent 5-HT2A and 5-HT2C antagonist... its clinical utility is often limited by sedation
Trazodone is frequently used off-label for insomnia, particularly in patients where benzodiazepines should be avoided

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: SERT inhibition; 5-HT1A agonist; 5-HT1B partial agonist; 5-HT3/7/1D antagonist
farmacos._search: vortioxetine adp_atyp_04 antidepressant multimodal N06AX26 cognitive symptoms; geriatric depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Multimodal antidepressant with pro-cognitive effects (vividly improving digital symbol substitution test scores). Notable for dose-dependent nausea (often transient). Has a lower impact on sexual function than most SSRIs. Very long half-life (~66h).

perlas_clinicas.quote: Vortioxetine was found to be among the most effective and best tolerated antidepressants in the network meta-analysis
Vortioxetine's unique mechanism (5-HT3 antagonism) may contribute to its pro-cognitive effects and its reduced sexual side effect profile

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: SERT inhibition; 5-HT1A partial agonist
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Not licensed in the EU for MDD
farmacos._search: vilazodone adp_atyp_05 antidepressant spari serotonin partial agonist and reuptake inhibitor N06AX24 depression with anxious features
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Serotonin partial agonist and reuptake inhibitor (SPARI). Must be taken with food to ensure absorption. Notable for frequent GI side effects (diarrhea), but may have a lower weight and sexual side effect profile than typical SSRIs.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Vilazodone is essentially a combination of an SSRI and the partial agonist buspirone in one molecule

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: MT1 and MT2 agonist; 5-HT2C antagonist
farmacos.titulacion_paso: Increase to 50mg after 2 weeks if no response
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Dizziness; somnolence; insomnia; nausea; diarrhea; elevated transaminases
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Liver function tests (LFTs) required at baseline and 3, 6, 12 and 24 weeks
farmacos._search: agomelatine adp_atyp_06 antidepressant melatonergic N06AX22 sleep architecture restoration; seasonal depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Unique antidepressant acting on MT1/MT2 receptors and 5-HT2C antagonism. Restores circadian rhythms and sleep architecture without daytime sedation. Requires mandatory LFT monitoring due to hepatotoxicity risk. Not FDA approved.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Agomelatine is the first melatonergic antidepressant... it resynchronizes circadian rhythms
Agomelatine is contraindicated in patients with any hepatic impairment and LFT monitoring is mandatory

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: SERT and NET inhibition; Alpha-1, H1, and Muscarinic antagonist
farmacos.efectos_muy_frecuentes: Xerostomia; somnolence; constipation; blurred vision; weight gain
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Arrhythmias; seizures; QT prolongation; sudden cardiac death (in toxic doses)
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; Neuropathic pain; Chronic tension-type headache; Migraine prophylaxis
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Melancholic depression; chronic neuropathic pain; insomnia
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: MAOIs; Recovery phase of MI; Arrhythmias; Linezolid; Methylene Blue IV
farmacos._search: amitriptyline adp_tca_01 antidepressant tca tricyclic SERT and NET inhibition N06AA09 melancholic depression; chronic neuropathic pain; insomnia
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

Gold standard tertiary amine TCA for efficacy in severe/melancholic depression. Significant anticholinergic and antihistaminic burden. Widely used at low doses for chronic pain and migraine prophylaxis. Lethal in overdose (sodium channel blockade).

perlas_clinicas.quote: TCAs like amitriptyline are highly effective but limited by side effects... blocking sodium channels in the heart can be fatal in overdose
Amitriptyline is widely used at low doses (10–50 mg) for the management of neuropathic pain and migraine

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Potent SERT inhibition; NET inhibition; Anticholinergic
farmacos.efectos_muy_frecuentes: Xerostomia; somnolence; constipation; sweating; weight gain
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Orthostatic hypotension; sexual dysfunction; increased seizure risk
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: MDD; OCD; Phobias; Panic Disorder; Cataplexy associated with Narcolepsy
farmacos._search: clomipramine adp_tca_02 antidepressant tca tricyclic Potent SERT inhibition N06AA04 refractory ocd; severe depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

The only TCA with potency for SERT inhibition comparable to SSRIs. Gold standard for refractory OCD. Higher risk of seizures (dose-dependent, >250mg) than other TCAs. Tertiary amine.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Clomipramine is unique among TCAs as it is a potent inhibitor of both 5-HT and NE reuptake... the most effective drug for OCD

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Potent NET inhibition; Mild SERT inhibition
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Dizziness; somnolence; orthostatic hypotension (Less than amitriptyline)
farmacos._search: nortriptyline adp_tca_03 antidepressant tca tricyclic Potent NET inhibition N06AA10 geriatric depression; depression with apathy
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

Secondary amine TCA (metabolite of amitriptyline). Generally better tolerated in the elderly due to lower orthostatic hypotension and anticholinergic burden compared to tertiary amines. Therapeutic window occurs between 50–150 ng/mL levels.

perlas_clinicas.quote: SSRIs are generally preferred... but if a TCA is used, nortriptyline is one of the better choices due to its reduced side effect profile

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibition of SERT and NET; Anticholinergic
farmacos._search: imipramine adp_tca_04 antidepressant tca tricyclic Inhibition of SERT and NET N06AA02 refractory depression; childhood enuresis
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

The first antidepressant ever discovered (1950s). Tertiary amine. Historically the benchmark for comparing newer antidepressants. Frequent orthostatic hypotension.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Imipramine was the original 'magic bullet' for depression... it is a prodrug for desipramine

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibition of SERT and NET; Antihistaminic/Anticholinergic
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Yes / Removed in some markets due to toxicity in overdose
farmacos._search: dosulepin adp_tca_05 antidepressant tca tricyclic Inhibition of SERT and NET N06AA16 depression with severe insomnia
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

Tertiary amine TCA similar to amitriptyline but associated with even higher cardiotoxicity in overdose. Use has declined or been restricted in many countries (e.g. UK). Avoid in patients at high suicide risk.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Due to its toxicity in overdose, dosulepin is no longer recommended for routine use

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Potent NET inhibition; Mild SERT inhibition
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Hepatotoxicity; arrhythmias (Lower risk than other TCAs)
farmacos._search: lofepramine adp_tca_06 antidepressant tca tricyclic Potent NET inhibition N06AA07 TCA with lower cardiotoxicity profile
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

A TCA that is highly lipophilic and behaves like a prodrug for desipramine. It is significantly less cardiotoxic than amitriptyline or imipramine. However, it is uniquely associated with hepatotoxicity risk.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Lofepramine is the least cardiotoxic of the older tricyclic antidepressants

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Irreversible inhibition of MAO-A and MAO-B; increases GABA
farmacos.titulacion_paso: Slow titration due to hypotensive risk
farmacos.efectos_muy_frecuentes: Orthostatic hypotension; weight gain; somnolence; sexual dysfunction
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Hypertensive crisis (Tyramine reaction); hepatotoxicity; serotonin syndrome
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: Tyramine-rich foods; Sympathomimetics; SSRIs; SNRIs; TCAs; Pethidine; Dextromethorphan
farmacos._search: phenelzine adp_maoi_01 antidepressant irreversible maoi increases gaba N06AF03 atypical depression; refractory anxiety
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Irreversible non-selective MAOI. Unique for increasing GABA levels, making it particularly effective for 'anxious' or 'atypical' depression. High risk of orthostatic hypotension and weight gain. Requires strict low-tyramine diet.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Phenelzine is the best MAOI for patients with anxious symptoms because it also increases brain GABA levels
Dietary restrictions must be followed for at least 2 weeks after stopping an irreversible MAOI

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Irreversible non-selective MAO inhibition; Weak SRI/NRI/DRI effect
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Dizziness; xerostomia; nausea; weight gain (Less than phenelzine)
farmacos._search: tranylcypromine adp_maoi_02 antidepressant irreversible maoi amphetamine analogue N06AF04 refractory depression; anergic/apathetic depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: A non-hydrazine irreversible MAOI with a chemical structure similar to amphetamine. Highly activating, often causing insomnia if taken late. The most potent MAOI for TRD. Significant risk of hypertensive crisis.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Tranylcypromine is the most stimulating of the irreversible MAOIs

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Reversible inhibition of MAO-A (RIMA)
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Take after meals; generally does not require strict tyramine diet (at normal doses)
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Social phobia; depression where sexual function is a priority
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: Citalopram; Clomipramine; SSRIs/SNRIs (Risk of Serotonin Syndrome); Sympathomimetics
farmacos._search: moclobemide adp_maoi_03 antidepressant rima reversible inhibition of mao-a N06AG02 social phobia; priority sexual function
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Reversible inhibitor of MAO-A (RIMA). Does not typically require a strict low-tyramine diet unless doses are very high (>900mg). Very low risk of sexual dysfunction. Not FDA approved.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Moclobemide has much lower dietary restriction requirements than irreversible MAOIs

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Irreversible MAO-A and MAO-B inhibition (Brain); spares intestinal MAO-A at 6mg
farmacos.restricciones_ue: N/A (Patch not EMA approved for depression)
farmacos._search: selegiline (transdermal) adp_maoi_04 antidepressant maoi patch irreversible brain mao-a and mao-b N06AF04 refractory depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Transdermal delivery of an irreversible MAOI that avoids first-pass metabolism in the gut. At the 6mg dose, it does not require tyramine dietary restrictions. Higher doses (9mg, 12mg) require full MAOI diet.

perlas_clinicas.quote: The selegiline patch is a major advance... it allows the treatment of depression without the tyramine reaction risk at the starting dose

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Irreversible non-selective MAO inhibition
farmacos._search: isocarboxazid adp_maoi_05 antidepressant irreversible maoi non-selective maO inhibition N06AF01 refractory depression
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: One of the older irreversible non-selective MAOIs. Less frequently used today than tranylcypromine or phenelzine, but still a potent option for refractory depression. Requires strict tyramine-free diet.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Isocarboxazid is a classical irreversible MAOI... clinical characteristics are similar to other MAOIs

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Antagonista α2-adrenérgico; H1; 5-HT2A/C
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: N/D; EMA: individualizar; Riesgo bajo reportado
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión con insomnio severo; necesidad de aumento de peso
farmacos._search: mianserina adp_atyp_07 antidepresivo tetracíclico antagonista α2-adrenérgico; h1; 5-ht2a/c n06ax03 depresion con insomnio severo; necesidad de aumento de peso insomnio; ansiedad
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Tetracíclico precursor de la mirtazapina; sedante y estimulante del apetito. Riesgo de discrasias sanguíneas (agranulocitosis), requiere monitorización del hemograma. Menor riesgo cardíaco que los tricíclicos.

perlas_clinicas.quote: mianserin... sedative properties... Agitated and anxious patients tend to respond best
Mianserin (A) (possible increased risk of bone marrow suppression)

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Modulador glutamatérgico; agonista μ-opioide atípico; neuroplasticidad
farmacos.titulacion_paso: Incremento a dosis plena desde inicio
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: No aprobado en EE.UU. (sustancia controlada en algunos estados)
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión ansiosa; paciente con intolerancia a efectos secundarios clásicos
farmacos._search: tianeptina adp_atyp_08 antidepresivo atípico modulador glutamatérgico; agonista μ-opioide atípico; neuroplasticidad n06ax14 depresion ansiosa; colon irritable; ansiedad
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Mecanismo atípico (modulador glutamatérgico/opioide mu atípico); no inhibe recaptación de 5-HT (potenciador según teorías antiguas). Ansiolítico sin sedación. Riesgo de abuso/dependencia por actividad opioide.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Tianeptine (Stablon, Coaxil, Tianeurax) – weak and atypical μ-opioid receptor agonist, other actions

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibición selectiva de la recaptura de noradrenalina (NET)
farmacos.titulacion_paso: Incrementar a 10 mg tras 3 semanas si necesario
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: Rechazado por FDA por dudas sobre eficacia
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Evitar si hay riesgo CV alto
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión con anergia severa y falta de motivación
farmacos._search: reboxetina adp_nri_01 inhibidor selectivo de la recaptación de noradrenalina (nri) inhibición selectiva de la recaptura de noradrenalina (net) n06ax18 depransia con anergia severa tdah; enuresis
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Inhibidor selectivo de la recaptación de noradrenalina (NRI). Eficacia cuestionada en depresión mayor comparada con SSRIs. Efectos adversos 'anticolinérgicos-like' (boca seca, hesitación urinaria) mediados por noradrenalina. No aprobado en EE.UU.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Reboxetine... approved in Europe... rejected by the U.S. FDA because of concerns over poor efficacy

perlas_clinicas.source: The Maudsley Prescribing Guidelines in Psychiatry
perlas_clinicas.quote: Reboxetine... Probably causes less SD than SSRIs/SNRIs though anti- depressant efficacy has been questioned

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: NaSSA: antagonista α2; 5-HT2/5-HT3; H1
farmacos.efectos_muy_frecuentes: Somnolencia; boca seca; aumento de apetito
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Aumento de peso; mareo; hipotensión ortostática
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión con insomnio y ansiedad; intolerancia a ISRS
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: IMAO; linezolid; azul de metileno IV
farmacos._search: mianserina adp_atyp_07 antidepresivo atipico nassa: antagonista α2; 5-ht2/5-ht3; h1 n06ax03 depresion con insomnio y ansiedad; intolerancia a isrs insomnio; ansiedad
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Tetracíclico precursor de la mirtazapina; sedante y estimulante del apetito. Riesgo de discrasias sanguíneas (agranulocitosis), requiere monitorización del hemograma. Menor riesgo cardíaco que los tricíclicos.

perlas_clinicas.quote: mianserin... sedative properties... Agitated and anxious patients tend to respond best
Mianserin (A) (possible increased risk of bone marrow suppression)

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibidor potente y selectivo de la recaptura de noradrenalina (NET)
farmacos.efectos_frecuentes: Mareo; aumento de peso; visión borrosa
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión con anergia severa que requiere sedación nocturna
farmacos.interacciones_contraindicadas: IMAO; fármacos que disminuyen umbral convulsivo
farmacos._search: maprotilina adp_tca_07 antidepresivo tetracíclico inhibidor potente y selectivo de la recaptura de noradrenalina (net) n06aa21 depresion con anergia severa dolor neuropatico
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

Tetracíclico similar a los TCA en efectos, pero con selectividad NET muy marcada. Riesgo de convulsiones significativamente mayor que otros antidepresivos, especialmente en dosis >200mg o titulación rápida.

perlas_clinicas.quote: maprotiline... selective for NE reuptake... increased risk of seizures

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibición recaptura NET/SERT + Antagonismo D2 (vía 7-hidroxiamoxapina)
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Sintomas extrapiramidales (SEP); Discinesia tardía; SNM; Convulsiones
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_fda: Trastorno depresivo mayor con ansiedad o agitación
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión mayor con características psicóticas o agitación severa
farmacos._search: amoxapina adp_tca_08 antidepresivo triciclico con efecto antipsicótico inhibición recaptura net/sert + antagonismo d2 (vía 7-hidroxiamoxapina) n06aa17 depresion con psicosis o agitacion
farmacos.perlas_clinicas:
⚠️ AGS Beers 2023 Criteria: AVOID in older adults due to potent anticholinergic profile, sedation, and orthostatic hypotension risk.

Único antidepresivo clásico con actividad antagonista D2 relevante (vía metabolito 7-OH). Útil en depresión psicótica, pero conlleva riesgo de síntomas extrapiramidales y discinesia tardía. Estructuralmente relacionada con la loxapina.

perlas_clinicas.quote: Amoxapine is a metabolite of loxapine... potent D2 receptor blocking properties... associated with neuroleptic side effects

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Agonista parcial D2/5-HT1A; antagonista 5-HT2A
farmacos.indicaciones_aprobadas_ema: Bipolar I; Esquizofrenia (No autorizada depresión mayor)
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión resistente con anhedonia y síntoma de inhibición
farmacos._search: aripiprazol adp_aug_01 agonista parcial d2 (antipsicótico de 3ª gen) agonista parcial d2/5-ht1a; antagonista 5-ht2a n05ax12 depresion resistente con anhedonia tics; tlp
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Agonista parcial D2. Como potenciador, actúa estabilizando la dopamina. Perfil de efectos secundarios favorable en peso y sedación comparado con otros antipsicóticos. El efecto adverso más problemático a dosis bajas es la acatisia.

perlas_clinicas.source: Treatment-resistant major depression... Nuñez et al. 2022
perlas_clinicas.quote: Aripiprazole... showed the most robust evidence for efficacy in augmentation of antidepressants... well tolerated relative to others

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Antagonista D2/5-HT2A; antagonista H1/alpha1; metabolito NRI (norquetiapina)
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión resistente con insomnio severo y ansiedad prominente
farmacos._search: quetiapina adp_aug_02 antipsicótico atípico (potenciador) antagonista d2/5-ht2a; antagonista h1/alpha1; metabolito nri (norquetiapina) n05ah04 depresistente insomnio; ansiedad
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Único antipsicótico aprobado en Europa como potenciador. La norquetiapina (metabolito activo) tiene afinidad por el NET, lo que añade un efecto 'dual'. Muy sedante; alto riesgo de aumento de peso y síndrome metabólico. Se prefiere la formulación XR para depresión.

perlas_clinicas.source: Treatment-resistant major depression... Nuñez et al. 2022
perlas_clinicas.quote: Quetiapine XR... effective augmentation... limited by side effects like weight gain and somnolence

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Agonista parcial D2/D3 + 5-HT1A; Antagonista 5-HT2A
farmacos.efectos_muy_frecuentes: Acatisia (menor que aripiprazol); aumento de peso
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión resistente con necesidad de mejor tolerabilidad que aripiprazol
farmacos._search: brexpiprazol adp_aug_03 agonista parcial d2 (antipsicótico de 3ª gen) agonista parcial d2/d3 + 5-ht1a; antagonista 5-ht2a n05ax16 depresistente tolerabilidad
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Evolución del aripiprazol. Menor actividad agonista parcial D2, lo que resulta en menor incidencia de acatisia, pero mayor tendencia al aumento de peso. Aprobación específica en EE.UU. como potenciador de antidepresivos.

perlas_clinicas.source: Treatment-resistant major depression... Nuñez et al. 2022
perlas_clinicas.quote: Brexpiprazole... similar efficacy to aripiprazole but potentially lower rates of akathisia... weight gain slightly higher

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibición de GSK-3; modulación de sistemas de 2dos mensajeros; neuroprotección
farmacos.ajuste_insuficiencia_renal: Reducir y monitorear estrechamente; evitar en IR grave
farmacos.efectos_raros_graves: Toxicidad renal crónica; neurotoxicidad; toxicidad aguda (emergencia)
farmacos.restricciones_ue: Monitoreo obligatorio de niveles, función renal y tiroidea
farmacos.riesgo_embarazo_multifuente: FDA: Teratógeno (Ebstein - riesgo bajo pero real); EMA: evitar 1er trimestre
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión con riesgo suicida; depresión resistente 'clásica'
farmacos._search: litio (carbonato) adp_aug_04 estatibilizador del ánimo / potenciador inhibición de gsk-3; modulación de sistemas de 2dos mensajeros; neuroprotección n05an01 riesgo suicida deprresistente
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Estrategia de potenciación con más evidencia acumulada e indicación específica de reducción de riesgo suicida. Requiere monitorización estrecha ('litemias') y vigilancia de función renal y tiroidea. Niveles de potenciación suelen ser menores que para manía.

perlas_clinicas.source: Treatment-resistant major depression... Nuñez et al. 2022
perlas_clinicas.quote: Lithium is the most established strategy for augmentation... reduces suicidal ideation and acts as a long-term stabilizer

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Modulación de receptores nucleares tiroideos; ↑ metabolismo basal; ↑ síntesis monoaminas
farmacos.titulacion_paso: Incremento a 50 mcg tras 1 semana si es necesario
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión resistente con síntomas de hipotiroidismo subclínico o lentitud
farmacos._search: liotironina (t3) adp_aug_05 hormona tiroidea (potenciador) modulación de receptores nucleares tiroideos h03aa02 deprresistente activacion
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Uso de T3 (triyodotironina) como estrategia de potenciación rápida. A menudo preferida sobre T4 por su paso directo al cerebro y mayor rapidez. Vigilar efectos cardíacos (taquicardia) y pérdida ósea en uso prolongado. Muy útil en anergia.

perlas_clinicas.quote: T3 has the best evidence among thyroid hormones for antidepressant augmentation, even in euthyroid patients

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibidor débil de recaptura DA; modulación de histamina y orexina
farmacos.titulacion_paso: Incremento a 200 mg si es necesario
farmacos.indicaciones_off_label: Fatiga asociada a depresión mayor resistente
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión con somnolencia residual y fatiga cognitiva severa
farmacos._search: modafinilo adp_aug_06 agente promotor de la vigilia (potenciador) inhibidor débil de recaptura da; modulación de histamina y orexina n06ba07 fatiga residiual activacion
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Utilizado para combatir la fatiga residual y la somnolencia excesiva en la depresión resistente. Aumenta la alerta sin el perfil de 'estímulo' de las anfetaminas clásicas. Advertencia crítica sobre reacciones cutáneas severas (SJS). Interacciona con anticonceptivos.

perlas_clinicas.source: Treatment-resistant major depression... Nuñez et al. 2022
perlas_clinicas.quote: Modafinil may be useful for fatigue and sleepiness in TRD... evidence is moderate

farmacos.mecanismo_principal: Inhibición recaptura DA/NE + ↑ liberación monoaminas
farmacos.sustrato_enzimatico_principal: Eliminación via hidrólisis en sangre (no CYP)
farmacos.indicaciones_off_label: Potenciación en Depresión Mayor Resistente (TRD) con anergia
farmacos.utilidad_sintomatica_clave: Depresión resistente con déficit ejecutivo y fatiga profunda
farmacos._search: lisdexanfetamina adp_aug_07 estimulante (profármaco de d-anfetamina) inhibición recaptura da/ne + ↑ liberación monoaminas n06ba12 fatiga profunda deficit ejecutivo
farmacos.perlas_clinicas: Profármaco de la dextroanfetamina con menor potencial de abuso inyectado/nasal por requerir hidrólisis enzimática en el glóbulo rojo. Útil como potenciación 'off-label' en depresión con gran componente de anergia y disfunción ejecutiva. Vigilar TA y sueño.

perlas_clinicas.source: Treatment-resistant major depression... Nuñez et al. 2022
perlas_clinicas.quote: Lisdexamfetamine is being increasingly used for cognitive and fatigue symptoms in TRD... evidence is growing
